---
title: "Welcome to My Website"
---

## Hello, I'm **Dalton** 👋

I'm a student at the **Singapore Institute of Technology (SIT)**, studying **Applied Artificial Intelligence**. This website is a space where I share my projects, interests, and learning journey.

::: {style="float:left; position: relative; top: 0px"}
![](https://via.placeholder.com/150){height="150px" style="margin-right: 20px; border-radius: 8px;"}
:::

I am passionate about **data engineering**, **visualisation**, and using technology to solve real-world problems. Outside of school, I enjoy photography, hiking, and exploring new cafés around Singapore.

<br style="clear:both;">

---

## What You'll Find Here

- 📖 **About** — A bit more about my background and interests
- 💼 **Projects** — Academic and personal projects I've worked on

---

## Currently Learning

- Quarto for reproducible reporting
- GitHub Pages for web hosting
- Data visualisation with Python and R

> "The best way to learn is by doing."
